headers.name: Authorization
headers.purpose: Bearer access token, audience https://api.partnercenter.microsoft.com (required on every call)

headers.name: MS-RequestId
headers.purpose: GUID for idempotency of write operations; reuse the same value on retries so the operation runs once

headers.name: MS-CorrelationId
headers.purpose: GUID to correlate a single request in logs and support cases; use a fresh one per logical operation

headers.name: Content-Type
headers.purpose: application/json on requests with a body

headers.name: Accept-Language / X-Locale
headers.purpose: Locale for localized responses, e.g. en-US

headers.name: ValidateMfa
headers.purpose: Set to true to ask the API to report MFA compliance; the response then includes isMfaCompliant

versioning: Resource paths are prefixed with /v1. The generatetoken (secure app model) API uses /v3. Pricing and Referrals APIs live on a separate host, https://api.partner.microsoft.com.
sandbox: Use your integration sandbox (TIP) account and its tokens while developing so you do not incur real charges. Sandbox customers created with an invalid address cannot be deleted.
rateLimits: Honor HTTP 429 responses and the Retry-After header; back off and retry. Long-running write operations may return HTTP 202 with a Location header - poll that URL for completion. Some collection endpoints (e.g. utilization) return 204 with Retry-After when data isn't ready yet.
